title: Futures: If a trader enters a long position in a futures...
summary: Define a long futures position as reflecting an expectation of rising asset prices.
prompt: If a trader enters a long position in a futures contract, what does that mean?

options.text: A long position in a futures contract indicates that the trader expects the

solution: A long position in a futures contract indicates that the trader expects the price of the underlying asset to rise, benefiting from the price increase.
